0.text: 3 cm mass enveloping the pleura at the apex of the right lung

1.text: Loculated pleural effusions measuring up to 5.3 cm in thickness between the pleural layers on the right

2.text: Reticular densities with irregular borders in the right upper lobe

3.text: Consolidation in the right middle lobe with air bronchograms and atelectatic changes

5.text: Multiple subcentimeter parenchymal nodules in both the upper and lower lobes of the left lung

6.text: 5 mm parenchymal nodule in the middle lobe of the right lung

7.text: Irregular thickenings of the mediastinal and costal pleura
